_comment: Epic 100 audit baseline — captures the BROKEN-state counters as of harness landing (#631). Each subsequent Epic 100 story drives its counter to its target (usually 0) and updates this file in its PR.
_howToRefresh: From the VM (DATABASE_URL set): cd apps/admin && npx tsx scripts/audit-epic-100.ts --json > tests/fixtures/epic-100-audit-baseline.json
_pretransitionNote: Counts below are placeholders captured pre-DB connection. First VM run will replace them with live values. Each story's PR drives its counter to target and updates this baseline.
